synergies.description: you usually buy spirit visage so you increase the heal she gives as well, she can keep mundo alive insanely hard.
she can sit on you and practically make you immortal, really good with mundo.
his speedup and revive are nuts. if the enemy can actually get you low enough to where you die, well guess what, they have to do it again because zilean can just ult you.

probably the best champion with mundo. if they cannot burst you down before his ult gives you the damage immunity, you will basically go back to full hp while you can't take damage. on top of that his stuns, heals and shields are insanely good with mundo.
